Petition By Beneficiares Alexandria Piccinini And Dominic Piccinini For 1) Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee 2) Order Surcharging Trustee Louis Giraudo And 3) Recovery Of Property
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Continued To Jun-23-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were called for hearing together:
PTR-24-307920, The Amended and Restated Robert M. Piccinini Living Trust;
PTR-24-307931, The Piccinini Children Trust II; and
PTR-24-307933, The Margaret Piccinini Revocable Trust

Appearances:
Frank Cialone and Eric Magnuson for Alexandria Piccinini and Dominic Piccinini, Petitioners.
Frank Busch and James Darling for Louis Giraudo and Nicole Pesco, Trustees.

Counsel requested that the two cases, the Amended and Restated Robert M. Piccinini Trust (307920) and the Piccinini Children Trust II case (307931), be consolidated. The third case (307933) was reported as likely to be resolved without further litigation. The Court granted the request for consolidation of the two cases and directed counsel to submit a proposed order for consolidation.

The parties informed the Court that they are working toward resolving the matters and requested that the suspension petition be continued for further negotiations. After discussing scheduling, the Court continued all matters to June 23, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Motion to Admit Brian K. Lee as Counsel Pro Hac Vice is GRANTED.
Motion to Admit Eric P. Magnuson as Counsel Pro Hac Vice is GRANTED.
